meaning: n.(产于英格兰南部的)无角短毛羊,无角短毛羊肉
examples: Until April 2005 Gary was also Master of the local Southdown and Eridge Hunt.
Bath and North East Somerset (Banes) Council has introduced the speed limit in Twerton and Southdown.
Andrew Thomas Wilkie, 41, was jailed for 16 months in March after admitting the thefts from Southdown Primary School in Buckley, Flintshire.
Cement producers like Southdown (53, SDW) and wallboard maker USG Corp. (51, USG) trade at less than ten times forward earnings in a market where their main products are in short supply.
